creator: jgm@osn.de
text:
(In reply to Marek Zarychta from comment #6)
Routing and traffic to the system is not a problem with disabled LRO, TSO and CSUM

hw.vtnet.csum_disable="1"
hw.vtnet.lro_disable="1"
hw.vtnet.tso_disable="1"

The only problem is that the kernel forwards unknown packets which should be dropped.
